rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §38.253, which governs a statewide inventory of mental health resources for school districts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 38.253. STATEWIDE INVENTORY OF MENTAL HEALTH RESOURCES.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
